anchor_payload.description: Canonical eu-v1 manifest of three FaultKey predictions on real EU enforcement matters: AP NL v. Clearview AI (€30.5M, 16 May 2024), Garante IT v. Luka Inc/Replika (€5M, 10 April 2025), AEPD ES v. Tools for Humanity/Worldcoin (precautionary cessation order under GDPR Art. 66(1), 6 March 2024).

opentimestamps.btc_confirmation_eta: 1-6 hours typically; will upgrade automatically once confirmed

commitment_key.purpose: Signed payload for Rekor inclusion. Key is one-time, generated for this commitment, no further use.
commitment_key.private_key_destruction: Private key destroyed via shred(1) on 2026-05-21 19:13Z, immediately after Rekor inclusion confirmed at log index 1593883680. The public key remains the sole verification material for this batch.

verification_one_liner: rekor-cli get --uuid=108e9186e8c5677ada1aca198ea8e0c9e86f0646067dd3feb99bafa20d99fd4963b5576eac024992 && sha256sum anchor-payload-eu-v1.json && cd ../anchor-log && node run-engine-eu.mjs
